lobe.name: Svrn7.Invoicing
lobe.title: SVRN7 Invoicing LOBE
lobe.description: Invoice processing via DIDComm invoice/1.0/* protocol. Computes transfer amounts from line items, executes same-Society or cross-Society transfers, and issues a TransferReceiptCredential as a DIDComm receipt.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

protocols.title: Invoice Request
protocols.description: Payer submits a payment request with line items. Body: { payerDid, payeeDid, lineItems[], invoiceId, dueDate }

protocols.title: Invoice Receipt
protocols.description: Society confirms transfer settlement. Body: { success, invoiceId, transferId, amountGrana, receiptVcId }

cmdlets.name: ConvertFrom-TdaInvoiceRequest
cmdlets.title: Parse Invoice Request
cmdlets.description: Resolves the inbox message and parses the invoice request body. Returns an invoice record for piping to Resolve-InvoiceAmount.

MessageDid.description: TDA resource DID URL of the inbox message. Form: did:drn:{networkId}/inbox/msg/{objectId}

TotalGrana.description: Sum of all line item amounts in grana.

cmdlets.name: Resolve-InvoiceAmount
cmdlets.title: Compute Invoice Total
cmdlets.description: Sums line item amounts in grana. Adds TotalGrana field to the invoice hashtable. Throws if any amount is non-positive.

TotalGrana.description: Sum of all line item amounts in grana.

cmdlets.name: New-TdaInvoiceReceipt
cmdlets.title: Build Invoice Receipt
cmdlets.description: Builds a DIDComm invoice/1.0/receipt OutboundMessage from a transfer result. Pipe from Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer or Invoke-Svrn7ExternalTransfer.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

cmdlets.name: Send-TdaInvoiceError
cmdlets.title: Send Invoice Error
cmdlets.description: Sends an invoice/1.0/receipt with success=false. Call in catch blocks when the transfer fails.

PeerEndpoint.description: HTTP/2 endpoint URL of the target TDA.

PackedMessage.description: JSON-serialised DIDComm message body (not yet packed — Switchboard packs before delivery).

MessageType.description: DIDComm @type URI of the outbound message.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Handles the full invoice-to-payment pipeline: parse invoice, compute total, execute transfer (same or cross-Society), return receipt. Depends on Svrn7.Society for transfer execution.
useCases: Processing a citizen payment for goods or services
Cross-Society invoice settlement via TransferOrder protocol
Returning a TransferReceiptCredential VC to the payer
compositionHints: Full pipeline: Get-TdaMessage | ConvertFrom-TdaInvoiceRequest | Resolve-InvoiceAmount | (transfer cmdlet) | New-TdaInvoiceReceipt | Send-TdaMessage
Use Test-Svrn7SocietyMember to decide between Invoke-Svrn7IncomingTransfer (same-Society) and Invoke-Svrn7ExternalTransfer (cross-Society)
Resolve-InvoiceAmount is a pure transform — it adds TotalGrana to the invoice hashtable and passes it through
Always wrap in try/catch and call Send-TdaInvoiceError if any step throws
limitations: Epoch 0: no partial payment support. Invoice must be paid in full.
Cross-Society transfer requires TargetSocietyDid resolved from payee DID Document.
